settings.title: See Why More and More People are Loving Coastline:

settings.heading: Improved Energy
settings.text: Supports cellular energy metabolism and mitochondrial function, helping the body meet daily energy demands more efficiently. Key ingredients like creatine and taurine assist in ATP buffering and energy production in active tissues.

settings.heading: More Restorative Sleep
settings.text: Formulated with ingredients like glycine and L-theanine that have been shown to support sleep quality and reduce nighttime waking. May help the body ease into restful sleep and improve next-day alertness.

settings.heading: Sharper Cognition
settings.text: Includes compounds like ergothioneine and creatine, which have demonstrated positive effects on memory and cognitive resilience under stress. May support neuroplasticity and protect brain structures from oxidative stress and age-related decline.

settings.heading: Brighter Mood
settings.text: Targets brain and body systems involved in emotional regulation. Nutrients like taurine and creatine have shown potential to support mood stability, reduce fatigue-related irritability, and complement standard treatments in clinical trials.

settings.heading: Improved Skin Appearance & Protection
settings.text: Antioxidants like ergothioneine and astaxanthin help reduce oxidative stress and may protect skin from environmental damage. Studies suggest improvements in hydration, texture, and UV resistance when used consistently alongside a healthy lifestyle.

settings.heading: Enhanced Physical Performance
settings.text: Backed by ingredients like creatine and taurine, shown to increase strength, muscle power, and endurance. These compounds assist energy production in muscle and may help support workout capacity and post-exercise recovery.

settings.heading: Improved Gut Health
settings.text: Contains inulin, a prebiotic fiber shown to support a healthy microbiome. Helps encourage beneficial bacteria growth, improve stool regularity, and enhance mineral absorption. A balanced gut environment is linked to overall wellness.

settings.heading: Improved Joint Function
settings.text: Features compounds like glucosamine and glycine, studied for their roles in cartilage health and inflammation reduction. May support flexibility, mobility, and daily comfort, especially when combined with physical activity and proper nutrition.

settings.heading: Promotes Heart Health
settings.text: Includes ingredients like CoQ10, taurine, and inulin, which may help support healthy blood pressure, cholesterol levels, and vascular function. These nutrients are associated with better cardiovascular resilience as part of a balanced lifestyle.

settings.title: How do I know Coastline is for me?
settings.text: Coastline is the perfect solution for adults who want to prioritize their full body healthspan. It's never too late to start taking care yourself. However, if you have conditions and are on medications, we recommend consulting with a doctor before starting any new health regimen.

settings.title: When should I expect to see the benefits?
settings.text: Stick with Coastline for at least 60 days and you'll begin to see in many areas of your health. Combining Coastline with other healthy daily practices will improve your healthspan as well.

settings.title: What benefits should I see from taking Coastline?
settings.text: You will see many short term performance benefits including improved sleep, clarity, and mood stabilization, in addition to many longer term, deeper, cellular level benefits associated with the improved functioning of all body systems.

settings.title: Are there any scientific studies supporting the effectiveness of this product?
settings.text: Yes. All of our ingredients are backed by clinical studies with proven effectiveness. It's what makes us the most rigorously formulated longevity supplement out there.

settings.title: Are there any side effects?
settings.text: Any side effects will be minimal. Slight gas and bloating may occur from mixing Coastline with other greens supplement products. Our formulations have been designed to avoid complications.

settings.title: Do you offer a satisfaction guarantee or return policy?
settings.text: Yes, we're so confident you'll love Coastline we're offering a 90 money back guarantee.

settings.title: What does Coastline taste like?
settings.text: The unflavored AM powder when mixed with water has a mildly sweet taste – like a very light sports drink. The Coastal Lemon flavor has a warm, sweet, lemonade taste. Both can easily be enjoyed simply with water, or in a smoothie, protein shake, or juice.

settings.title: What isn't Coastline?
settings.text: Coastline is not a nutritional supplemention system. It's is not a greens drink, a protein drink, or a meal replacement. It does not contain vitamins or minerals found in other health or green drinks. It contains compounds scientifically proven to promote improved function and lifespan across all body systems.

settings.title: Is Coastline okay to take with other supplements?
settings.text: It's important to avoid duplicating supplements, so we recommend checking the ingredient lists in detail before taking supernatural. Otherwise it is completely safe. Be sure to follow proper consumption guidelines.

settings.title: What if the science changes?
settings.text: Our formulation is revised yearly and we are constantly reviewing the latest science to ensure our formulations are the most trusted, comprehensive, and clinically proven on the market.

settings.title: How should I use this product?
settings.text: The Coastline system includes the Morning Blend powder which you simply enjoy with water or other drink along with your first meal of the day. In the morning you also take 1 Morning SoftGel. Then with, or after, your last meal of the day you take 2 of the Evening Capsules. it's that simple.

settings.heading: Simple beginnings to breakthrough benefits.
settings.description:
As young Dads in the midst of busy days and sleepless nights, we wanted a product that would help us feel and perform at our best, but we didn't know what to take or who to trust.
We wanted to maximize our healthspan over the long term, but didn't want to chase fads, and take ineffective or unnecessary supplements. We just wanted what's safe and effective – and have it all in one system. So we set out to create the world's simplest longevity system. To make it easier for more parents, like us, to make the most of this precious existence. And maybe even be around to skip our great grandkids down the aisle at their wedding.

And so, Coastline was born.
